docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,700.00 FILED BY NGUYEN, MIKE AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALEZ-ESCOBAR, HENRY RAMOS, ESPERANZA AKA ESPERANZA GONZALEZ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-29-2015 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

TRIAL RESET TO AUG-11-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JUL-20-2015 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-29-2015 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE ON BOTH DEFENDANTS TO JUL-20-2015 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506.
